title: Debug assertion sqlite3ExprSkipCollateAndLikely: Assertion `pExpr->op==TK_COLLATE' failed
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0((c0 NOTNULL) COLLATE BINARY);
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE(c0 NOTNULL) COLLATE BINARY BETWEEN 0 AND c0;
key_bug_features: SELECT with COLLATE on NOTNULL condition triggers assertion error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1((c1 NOTNULL) COLLATE NOCASE);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (c1 NOTNULL) COLLATE NOCASE BETWEEN 0 AND c1;
CREATE TABLE t2(c3 REAL, c4 BLOB);
